title: Activity
description: A live span of agent work — an occurrent UOW finer-grained than a ticket. One ticket spawns a tree of activities (a lead, its sub-agents, team peers, the critic). Activities are what the agent-level and activity-level Kanban lenses render, and what the agent monitor streams. Emitted to the ledger; workers/agents never write activity status directly — the server materializes it from ledger events (single-writer).

ticket.description: Parent ticket id (tkt-...). The activity exists to advance this ticket's target cell.

cell.description: Target cell id, inherited from the ticket — lets the activity lens cross-reference the lattice grid.

agent.description: The agent/role performing this span (e.g., cell-advancer, spec-architect, cell-validator).

parent_activity.description: The activity that spawned this one, or null for the root. The parent/child edges ARE the delegation tree the board visualizes.

team.description: Set when this activity is part of an agent team (role-specialized peers). Null for solo/sub-agent work.

role.description: Role within the team; typed handoffs occur between roles.

delegation_mode.description: How this activity relates to its children, mirroring the execution plan.

depth.description: Nesting depth in the delegation tree. Bounded by the plan's delegation.max_depth — handoff fidelity is multiplicative.

kind.description: The operation this span performs (operation vocabulary).

orchestration_shape.description: Inherited from the execution plan; lets the board badge a card as e.g. a parallel fan-out worker.

loop_strategy.description: The iteration discipline driving this span.

status.description: Live activity status — the activity-level Kanban column. 'handed-off' marks a typed handoff to a peer/child.

progress.description: Live progress for the agent monitor and the activity card.

summary.description: One-line current step (e.g., '3 type errors at handler.ts:42,78,103').

budget_fraction.description: Fraction of this span's budget consumed; drives the burning-budget indicator.

worktree.description: Hermetic worktree this span runs in (workers/critics).

lease_expiry.description: Lease for crash recovery; expiry returns the span (and its ticket) per §15.

signal_ref.description: For a validate/review activity: the signal artifact it wrote. Only validation-path activities populate this.

ledger_refs.description: Ledger events for this span's lifecycle — no silent work.
